rationale: Review 2 catches a real, material API design issue — three lemmas are unnecessarily restricted to singleton preimages when their proofs work identically for any `s : Set B`, as confirmed by the `Set.mem_singleton_iff` and `eq_comm` in the diff. Acting on it yields a strictly more general and reusable library. Review 1's finding (proof simplification for `mapsTo_fiber_symm`) is real but minor and doesn't improve the API shape.
